narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for advanced semiconductors and data center hardware remains the primary driver of technology sector momentum.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Clinical breakthroughs and pipeline expansion in obesity treatments continue to support pharmaceutical growth.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and resurgent inflation data are creating volatility and downward pressure in energy sectors.

narratives.name: AI Software Integration
narratives.thesis: Companies integrating generative AI into consumer and enterprise workflows are seeing renewed valuation support.

narratives.name: Resurgent Inflation Volatility
narratives.thesis: Hotter-than-expected inflation and PPI data are weighing on broader market indices and long-term treasuries.

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Upcoming US-China diplomatic engagements and regional economic shifts are driving volatility in China-linked equities.
